understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver a pushable object or selectable piece onto a specific goal tile, marked with a '+', in the grid. WIN is triggered once this condition is met.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs by selecting pieces using CLICK actions on their coordinates, which switches control between available pieces. Attempting to MOVE in any direction from a blocked spot (due to walls or grid edges) results in no movement. Selection is instant and toggles between pieces but does not advance the position toward the goal on its own. There appears to be a push mechanic implied, but in these turns, movement was not possible due to an obstacle or grid edge, so moving actions were ineffective. The core mechanic revolves around optimal switching and maneuvering around the grid's structure.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver a pushable object or selectable piece onto a specific goal tile, marked with a '+', in the grid. WIN is triggered once this condition is met.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement occurs by selecting pieces using CLICK actions on their coordinates, which switches control between available pieces. Attempting to MOVE in any direction from a blocked spot (due to walls or grid edges) results in no movement. Selection is instant and toggles between pieces but does not advance the position toward the goal on its own. There appears to be a push mechanic implied, but in these turns, movement was not possible due to an obstacle or grid edge, so moving actions were ineffective. The core mechanic revolves around optimal switching and maneuvering around the grid's structure.
